title: bauhinia subclavata
intro: Bauhinia subclavata, also known as the purple bauhinia or purple orchid tree, is a type of flowering plant species within the bauhinia genus. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Bauhinia subclavata is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating coughs, as well as acting as an immunostimulant to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or as a dried powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
